```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "tests/test_http1.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/1.1 transaction extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: x\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"\\x00\\x01\\x02\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_single():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = b\"GET /foo HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    s2c = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 1\r\n    assert txns[0].method == \"GET\"\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/foo\"\r\n    assert txns[0].authority == \"example.com\"\r\n    assert txns[0].status_code == 200\r\n    assert txns[0].flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n    assert txns[0].txn_id == compute_txn_id_http1(\"flow1\", 0)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_keepalive_two():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    s2c = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 2\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/first\"\r\n    assert txns[1].path == \"/second\"\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:24:08 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "tests/test_http1.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/1.1 transaction extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: x\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"\\x00\\x01\\x02\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_single():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = b\"GET /foo HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    s2c = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 1\r\n    assert txns[0].method == \"GET\"\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/foo\"\r\n    assert txns[0].authority == \"example.com\"\r\n    assert txns[0].status_code == 200\r\n    assert txns[0].flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n    assert txns[0].txn_id == compute_txn_id_http1(\"flow1\", 0)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_keepalive_two():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    s2c = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 2\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/first\"\r\n    assert txns[1].path == \"/second\"\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
